classes.name: BltMLP
classes.rationale: SwiGLU MLP (gate_proj, up_proj, down_proj with silu/ACT2FN); maps to llama_mlp.py which uses MergedColumnParallelLinear + SiluAndMul + RowParallelLinear

classes.name: BltRMSNorm
classes.rationale: Standard RMSNorm (pow(2).mean.rsqrt) despite the comment claiming T5LayerNorm equivalence; matches L1/rms_norm.py forward_native

classes.name: BltRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Computes cos/sin tables; uses interleaved (repeat_interleave dim=-1) cos/sin and stack-based rotate_half (non-Neox); rotary_emb.py supports is_neox=False (interleaved RoPE)

classes.name: BltTransformerLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring class: input_layernorm -> self_attn -> residual -> post_attention_layernorm -> mlp -> residual; composes BltSelfAttention, BltMLP, BltRMSNorm

classes.name: BltSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Llama-style decoder self-attention with separate Q/K/V projections, GQA, RoPE (interleaved), causal mask, KV cache; maps to LlamaAttention top-level wrapper

classes.name: BltCrossAttention
classes.rationale: Cross-attention: q_norm/k_norm RMSNorm, separate Q/K/V projections, no RoPE, no KV cache (uses cross_attention_states); decomposes to L1/linear + L1/dense_attention + L1/rms_norm

classes.name: BltLocalEncoder
classes.rationale: Wiring: stacks BltTransformerLayer + BltCrossAttention + embeddings; pure composition

classes.name: BltLocalDecoder
classes.rationale: Wiring class composing transformer layers and cross-attention

classes.name: BltGlobalTransformer
classes.rationale: Wiring: stacks BltTransformerLayer for global hidden states

classes.name: BltPatcher
classes.rationale: Wiring: stacks BltTransformerLayer + linear head for entropy patching

classes.name: BltModel
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring composing patcher + local encoder + global transformer + local decoder

inheritance_summary: BltMLP(MllamaTextMLP)
BltRMSNorm(MllamaTextRMSNorm)
BltRotaryEmbedding(LlamaRotaryEmbedding) - overrides forward to use interleaved RoPE
BltTransformerLayer(MllamaSelfAttentionDecoderLayer)
BltSelfAttention(MllamaTextSelfAttention)
BltCrossAttention(MllamaTextCrossAttention) - is_causal=False, adds q_norm/k_norm

classes.name: BridgeTowerResidualAttention
classes.rationale: CLIP-style residual block: nn.MultiheadAttention + LayerNorm + (Linear+QuickGELU+Linear) MLP; CLIP-pattern (QuickGELU is the CLIPMLP activation, but this uses nn.MultiheadAttention with custom attn_mask)

classes.name: BridgeTowerVisionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Patch embedding: Conv2d + class_embedding + position_embedding (CLIP-style vision embedding); decomposes from L1

classes.name: BridgeTowerLinkTower
classes.rationale: Cross-modal link with weighted sum + LayerNorm

classes.name: BridgeTowerSelfOutput
classes.rationale: BERT-style self-output: dense + dropout + LayerNorm; matches EncoderSelfOutput in encoder_attention.py

classes.name: BridgeTowerIntermediate
classes.rationale: BERT-style intermediate: Linear + GELU/ACT2FN; matches EncoderIntermediate

classes.name: BridgeTowerOutput
classes.rationale: BERT-style output: Linear + dropout + LayerNorm; matches EncoderOutput

classes.name: BridgeTowerPooler
classes.rationale: BERT pooler: take first token, dense + tanh

classes.name: BridgeTowerSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Roberta-derived self-attention: separate Q/K/V Linear projections, dense_attention with mask; matches EncoderSelfAttention

classes.name: BridgeTowerCrossAttention
classes.rationale: Cross-attention with separate Q/K/V projections (no RoPE, no causal); decomposes to L1/linear + L1/dense_attention; same family as encoder_attention but cross

classes.name: BridgeTowerAttention
classes.rationale: Wiring class around BridgeTowerSelfAttention or BridgeTowerCrossAttention + BridgeTowerSelfOutput

classes.name: BridgeTowerTextEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Roberta-style embeddings: word + position + token_type + LayerNorm; matches XLMRobertaEmbeddings (uses padding-aware position ids)

classes.name: BridgeTowerContrastiveHead
classes.rationale: Linear projection head for contrastive learning

inheritance_summary: BridgeTowerSelfAttention copied from RobertaSelfAttention
BridgeTowerCrossAttention copied from RobertaCrossAttention
BridgeTowerIntermediate/Output/SelfOutput/Pooler copied from BERT
BridgeTowerVisionEmbeddings copied from CLIPVisionEmbeddings
BridgeTowerResidualAttention is CLIP-pretrained vision residual block

classes.name: BrosPositionalEmbedding1D
classes.rationale: 1D sinusoidal positional embedding for bbox coordinates

classes.name: BrosPositionalEmbedding2D
classes.rationale: Wiring: combines two BrosPositionalEmbedding1D for 2D bbox

classes.name: BrosBboxEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Wiring: BrosPositionalEmbedding2D + Linear projection of bbox positions

classes.name: BrosTextEmbeddings
classes.rationale: BERT-style word + position + token_type embeddings + LayerNorm; matches BertEmbeddings

classes.name: BrosSelfAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style self-attention with optional bbox_pos_emb additive bias to keys; structurally EncoderSelfAttention with extra position bias

classes.name: BrosSelfOutput
classes.rationale: BERT-style self-output: dense + dropout + LayerNorm; matches EncoderSelfOutput

classes.name: BrosOutput
classes.rationale: BERT-style: Linear + dropout + LayerNorm; matches EncoderOutput

classes.name: BrosPooler
classes.rationale: BERT pooler: dense + tanh on first token

classes.name: BrosRelationExtractor
classes.rationale: Linear projection layers for relation extraction

inheritance_summary: BrosSelfAttention copied from BertSelfAttention with bbox positional bias added
BrosSelfOutput/Intermediate/Output/Pooler copied from BERT

classes.name: CamembertEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Roberta-derived embeddings (padding-aware position ids); matches XLMRobertaEmbeddings

classes.name: CamembertSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Roberta-style self-attention with separate Q/K/V; structurally EncoderSelfAttention

classes.name: CamembertCrossAttention
classes.rationale: Cross-attention sibling of CamembertSelfAttention; decomposes to L1/linear + L1/dense_attention

classes.name: CamembertSelfOutput
classes.rationale: BERT-style: dense + dropout + LayerNorm; matches EncoderSelfOutput

classes.name: CamembertOutput
classes.rationale: BERT-style: Linear + dropout + LayerNorm; matches EncoderOutput

classes.name: CamembertLMHead
classes.rationale: MLM head: Linear + GELU + LayerNorm + Linear decoder

inheritance_summary: CamembertModel(RobertaModel) - all components derived from Roberta which is structurally BERT with padding-aware position ids

classes.name: CanineEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Hash-bucket character embeddings (multiple Embedding shards) + position + token_type + LayerNorm; not BERT-style word embeddings (uses hashing)

classes.name: CanineSelfAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style self-attention (from_tensor/to_tensor; supports both self and cross modes); separate Q/K/V Linear; matches EncoderSelfAttention

classes.name: CanineSelfOutput
classes.rationale: BERT-style: dense + dropout + LayerNorm; matches EncoderSelfOutput

classes.name: CanineAttention
classes.rationale: Wiring: CanineSelfAttention + CanineSelfOutput; supports local chunk-attention loop

classes.name: CanineModel
classes.rationale: Wiring: embeddings + chars-to-molecules + initial+deep+final encoders + ConvProjection

inheritance_summary: Canine attention/MLP modeled after BERT but with character hash embeddings and 1D conv downsampling/upsampling between encoder stacks; supports local chunked attention but kernel is the same BERT-style SDPA

classes.name: ChameleonRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Standard Neox-style RoPE (cat freqs); matches L1/rotary_emb.py with is_neox=True

classes.name: ChameleonMLP
classes.rationale: SwiGLU MLP (gate_proj/up_proj/down_proj with silu); matches LlamaMLP

classes.name: ChameleonLayerNorm
classes.rationale: Custom LayerNorm with gamma/beta applied per-head; F.layer_norm without affine then manual scale; uses L1/layer_norm with custom application

classes.name: ChameleonAttention
classes.rationale: Llama-style attention with q_norm/k_norm (ChameleonLayerNorm per-head); maps to LlamaAttention with qk_norm enabled (non-RMS variant)

classes.name: ChameleonSwinDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: Swin-style residual ordering (norms after attn/mlp instead of before)

classes.name: ChameleonVQVAEVectorQuantizer
classes.rationale: Codebook embedding lookup with nearest-neighbor quantization

classes.name: ChameleonVQVAEEncoderConvDownsample
classes.rationale: Conv2d 3x3 stride=2 with manual asymmetric padding

classes.name: ChameleonVQVAEEncoderResnetBlock
classes.rationale: GroupNorm + silu + Conv2d + GroupNorm + silu + Conv2d residual block (silu computed via x*sigmoid(x))

classes.name: ChameleonVQVAEEncoderAttnBlock
classes.rationale: VQVAE 2D self-attention via 1x1 convs + bmm + softmax

inheritance_summary: ChameleonRMSNorm/RotaryEmbedding/MLP copied from Llama
ChameleonAttention extends with q_norm/k_norm (ChameleonLayerNorm, not RMS) per-head
VQVAE uses GroupNorm + Conv2d + 2D self-attention

classes.name: ChineseCLIPTextEmbeddings
classes.rationale: BERT-style embeddings (word + position + token_type + LayerNorm); matches BertEmbeddings

classes.name: ChineseCLIPVisionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Patch Conv2d + class_embedding + position_embedding (CLIP-style vision embeddings)

classes.name: ChineseCLIPVisionAttention
classes.rationale: Standard CLIP attention with separate Q/K/V/O Linear projections

classes.name: ChineseCLIPVisionMLP
classes.rationale: CLIP MLP: Linear + QuickGELU + Linear; matches L2/clip_mlp.py:CLIPMLP

classes.name: ChineseCLIPVisionLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: ln1 + self_attn + residual + ln2 + mlp + residual

inheritance_summary: Text path = BERT (via Align) - text uses BERT not CLIP text
Vision path = CLIP (CLIPAttention with QuickGELU MLP)

classes.name: CHMv2ReassembleLayer
classes.rationale: Conv2d 1x1 + ConvTranspose2d (upsample) or Conv2d 3x3 (downsample); depth-anything reassemble layer

classes.name: CHMv2ReassembleStage
classes.rationale: Wiring: stacks ReassembleLayer; readout projection via Linear+GELU

classes.name: CHMv2PreActResidualLayer
classes.rationale: ReLU + Conv2d 3x3 + ReLU + Conv2d 3x3 residual block

classes.name: CHMv2UpsampleConvHead
classes.rationale: Conv 3x3 + 2x bilinear upsample + Conv 3x3 + ReLU + Conv 1x1

classes.name: CHMv2Head
classes.rationale: Wiring: Reassemble + projection convs + FeatureFusion stack + UpsampleConvHead

classes.name: CHMv2FeaturesToDepth
classes.rationale: Pure tensor math (relu/clamp/log/linspace) for depth-bin softmax expectation; no parameterized kernels beyond elementwise

inheritance_summary: CHMv2ReassembleLayer(DPTReassembleLayer); CHMv2PreActResidualLayer(DepthAnythingPreActResidualLayer); pure DPT-style depth head with no transformer compute (uses external backbone like DINOv2)

classes.name: ClapAudioAFFBlock
classes.rationale: Attentional Feature Fusion: Conv2d + ReLU + sigmoid gating

classes.name: ClapAudioSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Swin window self-attention with relative-position bias; structurally distinct from standard encoder attention (window-based, has relative position bias table); decomposes from L1 (no Swin-specific kb-nano file)

classes.name: ClapAudioSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Swin self-output: Linear + dropout (no LayerNorm, residual elsewhere)

classes.name: ClapAudioLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: ln + window-attention + drop_path + ln + intermediate + output

classes.name: ClapAudioPatchMerging
classes.rationale: Swin patch merging: 4x stack + LayerNorm + Linear (4C -> 2C)

inheritance_summary: Audio path: Swin-style hierarchical encoder with window attention, relative position bias, patch merging - structurally similar to Swin (no Swin-specific kb-nano file in this batch's scope; decomposes from L1)
Text path: Roberta-style BERT encoder; uses encoder_attention.py + encoder_mlp.py + encoder_embeddings.py

classes.name: CLIPVisionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d patch embedding + class_embedding + position_embedding (no fused kb-nano vision-embedding file used here)

classes.name: CLIPTextEmbeddings
classes.rationale: [v2 fix] token + position embeddings (CLIP-style); composes from L1/embedding.py + L1/layer_norm.py.

classes.name: CLIPAttention
classes.rationale: Standard CLIP self-attention with separate Q/K/V/O projections (bias=True), no causal by default; matches L2/clip_attention.py:CLIPAttention

classes.name: CLIPMLP
classes.rationale: fc1 + activation (default QuickGELU) + fc2; matches L2/clip_mlp.py:CLIPMLP

classes.name: CLIPTextModel
classes.rationale: Top-level text encoder; kb-nano L4/clip_text_model.py is the pipeline wiring

inheritance_summary: CLIPAttention: separate Q/K/V/O Linear with bias=True; CLIPMLP: fc1 + QuickGELU + fc2 (per ACT2FN[hidden_act]); kb-nano has dedicated L2/clip_attention.py and L2/clip_mlp.py and L4/clip_text_model.py

classes.name: CLIPSegTextEmbeddings
classes.rationale: [v2 fix] token + position embeddings (CLIP-style); composes from L1/embedding.py + L1/layer_norm.py.

classes.name: CLIPSegDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: same shape as encoder layer (post-norm vs pre-norm difference)

classes.name: CLIPSegDecoder
classes.rationale: Wiring: dense reduces + decoder layers + upsample/transposed conv head

classes.name: CLIPSegForImageSegmentation
classes.rationale: Wiring: clip + segmentation decoder + upsampling head

inheritance_summary: All compute modules inherit unchanged from CLIP (CLIPAttention, CLIPMLP, CLIPVisionEmbeddings, CLIPTextEmbeddings); ClipSeg adds a transformer decoder + transposed-conv head on top

classes.name: ClvpRMSNorm
classes.rationale: Standard Llama-style RMSNorm (pow.mean.rsqrt); matches L1/rms_norm.py despite docstring claiming T5LayerNorm

classes.name: ClvpRotaryPositionalEmbedding
classes.rationale: Rotary embedding with cos/sin tables (cat freqs, Neox-style); maps to L1/rotary_emb.py

classes.name: ClvpSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Self-attention with partial RoPE (rotary_emb_dim < head_dim) and optional KV cache; not pure encoder, decomposes from L1

classes.name: ClvpGatedLinearUnit
classes.rationale: Gated linear unit: chunk(2) + multiply by activation(gate) (typically GELU); kb-nano has L1/gelu_and_mul.py for fused GELU+mul (only matches if hidden_act='gelu')

classes.name: ClvpEncoderMLP
classes.rationale: Wiring: ClvpGatedLinearUnit + Linear; uses fused GLU pattern

classes.name: ClvpDecoderMLP
classes.rationale: GPT-2 style MLP: Conv1D (Linear) + ACT2FN + Conv1D

classes.name: ClvpDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: input_layernorm (LayerNorm) + attn + post_attention_layernorm + decoder MLP

classes.name: ClvpEncoder
classes.rationale: Wiring: stacks ClvpEncoderLayer + final RMSNorm + summary

inheritance_summary: Speech encoder uses RMSNorm + RoPE-based attention + GLU (gate*activation) MLP
Decoder is GPT-2 style with LayerNorm + Conv1D MLP + same ClvpSelfAttention class (RoPE optional via rotary_pos_emb arg)

classes.name: CodeGenAttention
classes.rationale: GPT-J-style fused QKV (qkv_proj => embed_dim*3) split with mp_num=4 layout, partial rotary (rotary_dim) using sinusoidal cos/sin precomputed table; structurally distinct from Llama (no L2 wrapper); decomposes from L1

classes.name: CodeGenMLP
classes.rationale: GPT-J-style MLP: fc_in + ACT2FN (default new_gelu) + fc_out + dropout (no SwiGLU); decomposes from L1

classes.name: CodeGenBlock
classes.rationale: Wiring: ln_1 + parallel attn+mlp residual (GPT-J pattern: attn_out + mlp_out + residual)

classes.name: CodeGenModel
classes.rationale: Wiring: wte + drop + stacked CodeGenBlock + ln_f

inheritance_summary: CodeGen is GPT-J derived: fused QKV with TPU-style mp_num=4 split, partial rotary using fixed sinusoidal table (not Llama-style rope_init_fn), GELU MLP (no gate/up/down)

classes.name: CohereLayerNorm
classes.rationale: TRUE LayerNorm with mean centering (NOT RMSNorm): subtracts mean, divides by sqrt(var+eps), applies weight; structurally a LayerNorm without bias; no gemma_rms_norm match; closest is L1/layer_norm.py

classes.name: CohereRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Interleaved RoPE (repeat_interleave + stack/flatten rotate_half); supports L1/rotary_emb.py with is_neox=False

classes.name: CohereMLP
classes.rationale: Standard LlamaMLP (gate/up/down with silu); inherits unchanged

classes.name: CohereAttention
classes.rationale: LlamaAttention with optional CohereLayerNorm-based qk_norm (NOT RMSNorm); matches LlamaAttention but qk_norm uses LayerNorm not RMSNorm — partial match

classes.name: CohereDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: input_layernorm + parallel attn+mlp residual (single-norm Cohere pattern)

inheritance_summary: CohereLayerNorm is true LayerNorm (mean-centered) with weight only - distinct from RMSNorm/T5LayerNorm; CohereAttention extends LlamaAttention with optional QK-Norm using CohereLayerNorm; Cohere uses interleaved RoPE; parallel attn+mlp pattern (single layernorm before both branches)

classes.name: Cohere2Attention
classes.rationale: Cohere attention with sliding window (alternating sliding/full layers); same kernel as LlamaAttention with sliding_window param

classes.name: Cohere2DecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: same parallel attn+mlp pattern as CohereDecoderLayer with sliding window switch

inheritance_summary: Cohere2 = Cohere + sliding window alternation (Gemma2-style); same LayerNorm + interleaved RoPE + parallel attn+mlp

classes.name: Cohere2VisionMultiModalProjector
classes.rationale: Pixel-shuffle + LayerNorm + Linear + silu projection (Aya-Vision style)

inheritance_summary: Cohere2VisionModel(AyaVisionModel) - composition of SigLIP vision tower + Cohere2 text decoder + multimodal projector

classes.name: CohereAsrDecoderMLP
classes.rationale: Inherits CLIPMLP: Linear + activation + Linear; CLIP-MLP pattern

classes.name: CohereAsrSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Decoder self-attention (Moonshine-derived) with RoPE and KV cache; structurally LlamaAttention-like but Moonshine variant

classes.name: CohereAsrCrossAttention
classes.rationale: Decoder cross-attention to encoder K/V (audio); matches WhisperCrossAttention pattern (encoder K/V projected once, used across decode steps)

classes.name: CohereAsrDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: norm + self-attn + norm + cross-attn + norm + MLP

inheritance_summary: CohereAsr is Moonshine-derived ASR: encoder-decoder with audio encoder + decoder (self-attn + cross-attn + MLP); MLP is CLIP-style (Linear+act+Linear); cross-attention uses Whisper-style K/V-prefilled cache

classes.name: ColModernVBertForRetrieval
classes.rationale: Wraps ModernVBert vision-language model with retrieval projection Linear head; pure wiring

inheritance_summary: ColModernVBertForRetrieval(ColPaliForRetrieval) - thin retrieval wrapper around ModernVBert (out of this batch's compute scope)

classes.name: ColPaliForRetrieval
classes.rationale: Wraps PaliGemma vision-language model with retrieval projection Linear head; pure wiring

inheritance_summary: ColPaliForRetrieval - retrieval wrapper around PaliGemma backbone

classes.name: ColQwen2ForRetrieval
classes.rationale: Wraps Qwen2-VL with retrieval projection Linear head; pure wiring

inheritance_summary: ColQwen2ForRetrieval(ColPaliForRetrieval) - retrieval wrapper around Qwen2-VL

classes.name: ConditionalDetrFrozenBatchNorm2d
classes.rationale: Frozen BN2d with fixed running stats; matches L1/frozen_batch_norm2d.py

classes.name: ConditionalDetrConvEncoder
classes.rationale: Wiring: external CNN backbone (e.g. ResNet-50) with FrozenBN replacement

classes.name: ConditionalDetrSinePositionEmbedding
classes.rationale: 2D sinusoidal position embedding for image features

classes.name: ConditionalDetrSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Encoder self-attention with separate Q/K/V; position embeddings ADDED to Q/K (not V) before projection - matches DETR encoder pattern; decomposes from L1

classes.name: ConditionalDetrDecoderSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Decoder self-attention with separate content+position projections (q_content+q_pos, k_content+k_pos, v); decomposes from L1 (no DETR-specific kb-nano file)

classes.name: ConditionalDetrDecoderCrossAttention
classes.rationale: Cross-attention with content/pos concatenation (head_dim doubled); decomposes from L1 with concat-style q/k construction

classes.name: ConditionalDetrMLP
classes.rationale: fc1 + ACT2FN (default ReLU) + fc2; decomposes from L1

classes.name: ConditionalDetrDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: decoder self-attn + ln + cross-attn + ln + mlp + ln

classes.name: ConditionalDetrMaskHeadSmallConv
classes.rationale: Mask head: stacked Conv2d + GroupNorm + ReLU + bilinear upsample

classes.name: ConditionalDetrMHAttentionMap
classes.rationale: Returns spatial attention map only (no value mul); Q via Linear, K via Conv2d 1x1; softmax over flattened H*W

classes.name: ConditionalDetrDecoder
classes.rationale: Wiring: stacks DecoderLayer + iterative box refinement

inheritance_summary: ConditionalDetr inherits much from DETR: ConvEncoder + frozen BN, sinusoidal/learned 2D pos embeddings; ConditionalDetrSelfAttention=DetrSelfAttention; the decoder self/cross-attention are DETR-conditional-specific (separate content+position projections)

classes.name: ConvBertEmbeddings
classes.rationale: BERT-style word + position + token_type embeddings + LayerNorm

classes.name: ConvBertSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Hybrid: standard self-attention + span-based dynamic conv (SeparableConv1D + conv_kernel_layer + unfold); decomposes from L1; not a vanilla BERT attention

classes.name: ConvBertSelfOutput
classes.rationale: BERT-style: dense + dropout (no LayerNorm in self-output here per the code); matches partial EncoderSelfOutput

classes.name: GroupedLinearLayer
classes.rationale: Block-diagonal Linear (split into num_groups, applies separate linear per group); reshapes input/output

classes.name: ConvBertIntermediate
classes.rationale: BERT-style intermediate (uses GroupedLinearLayer when num_groups>1, else Linear)

classes.name: ConvBertSequenceSummary
classes.rationale: Reduce sequence to single vector with Linear + activation

inheritance_summary: ConvBert mixes standard BERT self-attention with a span-based dynamic conv head (SeparableConv1D + unfold + softmax over kernel positions); MLP can be 'grouped' linear (block-diagonal); not a pure encoder-attention match - decomposes from L1

classes.name: ConvNextLayer
classes.rationale: Depthwise Conv2d 7x7 + LayerNorm + Linear (pointwise) + GELU + Linear (pointwise) + layer-scale residual; ConvNeXt block (no GRN, that's V2)

inheritance_summary: ConvNext (v1) block: dwconv 7x7 + LN + pwconv (Linear) + GELU + pwconv (Linear) + layer-scale + DropPath; no GRN (that's v2)

classes.name: ConvNextV2GRN
classes.rationale: Global Response Normalization; matches L1/grn.py used inside L2/convnextv2_block.py

classes.name: ConvNextV2Layer
classes.rationale: ConvNeXtV2 block: dwconv7x7 + LN + Linear + GELU + GRN + Linear + DropPath; matches L2/convnextv2_block.py:ConvNeXtV2Layer (verified: imports conv2d, layer_norm, linear, gelu, grn)

classes.name: ConvNextV2Stage
classes.rationale: Wiring: downsample + stacks ConvNeXtV2Layer; kb-nano L3/convnextv2_stage.py

classes.name: ConvNextV2Encoder
classes.rationale: Wiring: stacks Stage; kb-nano L4/convnextv2.py is the pipeline

inheritance_summary: ConvNextV2 = ConvNext + GRN (Global Response Normalization) replacing layer-scale; kb-nano has dedicated L1/grn.py + L2/convnextv2_block.py + L3/convnextv2_stage.py + L4/convnextv2.py for this architecture

classes.name: CpmAntLayerNorm
classes.rationale: RMSNorm (variance.rsqrt with weight only); standard Llama-style RMSNorm despite name

classes.name: CpmAntAttention
classes.rationale: Self/cross-attention with separate Q/K/V Linear (no bias), additive position_bias (T5-like relative bias passed externally), KV cache; decomposes from L1

classes.name: CpmAntDenseGatedACT
classes.rationale: Gated GELU MLP: Linear + GELU + multiply by Linear (gated activation, similar to GeGLU)

classes.name: CpmAntSegmentPositionEmbedding
classes.rationale: T5-style relative position bias with segment-aware bucketing

inheritance_summary: CpmAnt = Chinese GPT-3 derivative: RMSNorm + Q/K/V attention with T5-style segment-aware relative position bias + GeGLU-like gated MLP (GELU gate); no kb-nano L2 wrapper for this exact pattern (decomposes from L1)

classes.name: CsmMLP
classes.rationale: SwiGLU MLP (gate/up/down + ACT2FN typically silu); matches LlamaMLP

classes.name: CsmAttention
classes.rationale: Standard Llama-style decoder attention with RoPE + KV cache + GQA; matches LlamaAttention

classes.name: CsmDepthDecoderForCausalLM
classes.rationale: Wiring: depth decoder model + codebooks head

classes.name: CsmBackboneModelEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Sums Embedding for text + per-codebook embeddings

inheritance_summary: Csm = Conversational Speech Model: dual decoder (backbone Llama + depth decoder Llama) for codebook prediction; both decoders are pure Llama (RMSNorm + RoPE + LlamaMLP + LlamaAttention)

classes.name: MultiHeadAttention
classes.rationale: Standard MHA: separate Wq/Wk/Wv Linear + scaled_dot_product_attention + dense out projection; KV cache supported; decomposes from L1 (no rotary, simple causal mask)

classes.name: EncoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: ln1 + MHA + dropout + residual + ln2 + ffn (Sequential[Linear+ReLU+Linear]) + dropout + residual

classes.name: CTRLModel
classes.rationale: Wiring: token embedding + sinusoidal position encoding + stacked EncoderLayer + final LayerNorm

inheritance_summary: CTRL is original transformer-XL style: MHA with separate Q/K/V (no GQA/RoPE), causal mask, sinusoidal absolute position encoding (added pre-input), Sequential ReLU MLP; decomposes from L1

classes.name: CvtSelfAttentionConvProjection
classes.rationale: Depthwise Conv2d + BatchNorm2d (used to produce Q/K/V in CvT)

classes.name: CvtSelfAttentionLinearProjection
classes.rationale: Reshape b c h w -> b (h w) c

classes.name: CvtSelfAttention
classes.rationale: CvT self-attention: depthwise Conv2d + BN projects Q/K/V (with stride for K/V), then Linear, then einsum-based attention with cls token; decomposes from L1 (no kb-nano CvT-specific file)

classes.name: CvtSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Dense + dropout (no LayerNorm here, layernorm is outside in CvtLayer)

classes.name: CvtLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: ln + attn + drop_path + residual + ln + intermediate + output + drop_path

classes.name: CvtStage
classes.rationale: Wiring: optional cls_token + Embedding + stacked CvtLayer

inheritance_summary: CvT = Convolutional Vision Transformer: hybrid where Q/K/V are produced by depthwise Conv2d + BN (instead of Linear) before the standard MHA; cls token is preserved across stages; no kb-nano CvT-specific kernel - decomposes from L1
